pitch.product_pitched: Term plus mutual fund combined plan

objections_faced.customer_quote: Abhi WhatsApp karega to abhi kaam kar rahe hain hum log.
objections_faced.agent_response_summary: The agent explained that she needs to brief the customer on the plan first and asked for a more comfortable time to connect.

verbatim_examples: premium pay karenge wo aapka refundable hota hai plus tax free hota hai

call_end.end_reason_evidence: Theek hai sir main aapko ek baar call karti hun. Theek hai sir. Customer: Okay. Agent: Okay thank you.

strengths: Maintained a professional and polite tone throughout the call
Efficiently gathered basic demographic and financial information
Successfully converted a 'busy' objection into a scheduled callback
improvement_areas: Failed to ask for the customer's consent to speak at the beginning of the call
Made absolute claims about premiums being refundable without providing necessary disclaimers
coaching_recommendations: Instruct the agent to use a consent-seeking opening (e.g., 'Is this a good time to talk?') to improve customer experience
Provide compliance training on the risks of promising 'refundable' premiums to avoid mis-selling claims
exemplary_quotes: Wahi main aap se keh rahi hun aap mujhe koi comfortable time bata sakte hain apna aapko samne se call kar lungi.
problematic_quotes: premium pay karenge wo aapka refundable hota hai plus tax free hota hai
profile.summary: Agent Anjali introduced a TATA AIA combined plan and conducted basic discovery regarding the customer's age, occupation, and income. The customer was busy at work and requested information via WhatsApp, which the agent professionally deflected to secure a callback for 5 PM. However, the agent made a compliance risk by claiming premiums are refundable without a disclaimer.
